prompts.system: pi subagent-backed release-model pass: delegate agent, fresh context. Pi hidden system prompt is not exposed; prompts.user records the exact parent-visible task sent to the subagent.
prompts.user:
You are participating in an Agentic Mermaid subagent-backed release-model transcript eval. Return ONLY executable synchronous JavaScript body for Agentic Mermaid Code Mode; no markdown, no code fences, no prose.

Runtime contract:
- The code is passed to execute(code), so top-level `return` is allowed.
- Global `mermaid.*` SDK is available.
- Do not use async/await, Promise jobs, dynamic import, filesystem, network, or template-literal interpolation.
- For existing structured diagrams: parseMermaid -> family narrower -> mutate -> verifyMermaid -> inspect verify.ok or verify.warnings/layout -> serializeMermaid.
- For source-level/opaque fallback diagrams, do not mutate; preserve parsed body.source.

Task ID: sequence_alt_add_message
Task: Given a sequence diagram with an alt block, add a top-level message A->>B: bye using structured mutation, verify, then serialize. The alt block must be preserved verbatim.
Input Mermaid source:
sequenceDiagram
  A->>B: hi
  alt ok
    B-->>A: yes
  end

Return only executable synchronous Code Mode JavaScript.
